{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321124527B26F29DB947747F4662C"}"},"total":129},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7517911926104228633","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，感情线还可以，最重要的是女主描写得越来越好了，不算聪明但心灵手巧，有自己的闪光点，没完全被男主的光芒压下去，而且配角都写得很有味道，无雌竞，无论男女关系都很好，是真正在朝万人迷方向发展，所以比起感情线我更喜欢女主的成长线","text_exts":[{"e":91,"s":88,"text":"万人迷","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177406832747F4662C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227517911926104228633%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227507533982133652504%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1750402522,"group_id":"7507533982133652504","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"仇恨使你活着，爱使你自由","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2DDRftliecJ73STc292mPk56iXxBCdjG1Uaq68oyeb/","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/50b9ad2e911d4350a661ed242f7ba04b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619957&x-signature=53uouOBNAdIy%2B0fPtzaNq6jLjeQ%3D","user_id":"1869616037786291","user_name":"卡尔的朋友"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1869616037786291","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7507533982133652504","book_info":{"abstract":"唐娜不幸被坠落的陨石砸中，逸散的脑电波阴差阳错绑定了万人迷系统，获得了能够重塑肉身的机会，在系统的帮助下，她穿梭到综英美的各个世界中获取主角体内的能量，咦，你问要怎么获取？嘿嘿......当然是和主角成为朋友啦！
【女主从小透明慢慢晋升万人迷的成长史】
【综英美比较人气的基本都会写（有想看的角色可以评论）】
【结局修罗场+各个男主的1V1番外线】
【排雷：1.OOC私设如山，会尽量往原版上靠，但每个人对角色的理解都不一样，如有不适请谅解。2.会拆原CP。3.主角金手指略强。4.剧情大部分会在原来的基础上二创，方便代入。5.自产粮！小甜饼！后期人物恋爱脑请轻喷（实在是没得吃了）。】
卷毛大侦探：好久不见，华生和玛丽说他们非常想念你做的柠檬巴斯克......我吗？我比较想你（伪人时刻）。
待定角色（非出场顺序）：美国翘臀、星际khan、冬日吧唧、奇异博士、诡计邪神、话痨蜘蛛、钢牙小丑、超人克拉克、韦恩老爷、康斯坦丁、守护HP、秃头教授、万磁王......
等系统的能量吸收得差不多时，唐娜也离开了这些神奇的世界，想要平静的过完自己剩下的日子，等等！为什么身边的熟人越来越多了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7f0c09bfc318bdd99db9b179c862c274~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"九奈木木生","author_id":"","book_id":"7507533982133652504","book_name":"综英美：万人迷是如何养成的","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6140人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1015,"name":"女频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1015&name=女频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7507534081081491992","read_count":"6140","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"922003"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"384","tags":"女频衍生,系统,穿越,甜宠,1v1,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a3113e8355b21fa9fa8a5b53b0edf3f3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779252327&x-signature=w0IkEo6e7GtRCaSxJ3mhGdJhVNs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"8349064198","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"42"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321124527B26F29DB947747F4662C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4632,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":4491},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1750412172,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7531094701437895448","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊，真的写得超级棒！能吃到这么香的饭我真是有福了！目前只看了第一个世界，我真的在狠狠期待番外的联动，“聪明是性感的定义”在番外部分展现得淋漓尽致。女主也是真的好可爱好可爱，尤其是三个看起来明明是理性至上的人最后还是清楚地沦陷了，完全是个人魅力啊。

夏洛克：“你是我所有逻辑链条中唯一无法被归谬的终点，是我穷尽所有演绎也无法解开的唯一恒等式。”

阿佩斯：“原定是在那里跟你们见最后一面的，可是她太有力气了，一把就将我捞了上来。”

麦考夫：“戳破什么？我对她的那点悸动压根谈不上感情，远远谈不上。”
阿佩斯：“骗骗自己就得了，还想骗过我？”
阿佩斯：“我们都被困在这里，麦考夫，没人能救我们。”","text_exts":[{"e":135,"s":132,"text":"夏洛克","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%8F%E6%B4%9B%E5%85%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177406832747F4662C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227531094701437895448%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227507533982133652504%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%8F%E6%B4%9B%E5%85%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753480815,"group_id":"7507533982133652504","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢在看文的时候随机在评论区自由发挥一些小段落","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxfhJRo31llEWME1iRQbPsQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a6fd7a05a95242e7906345f008f501be~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776624343&x-signature=3v23AcM6%2FF2PiUdFxoR8P83g1QU%3D","user_id":"818509192899280","user_name":"软软狐狸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"818509192899280","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7507533982133652504","book_info":{"abstract":"唐娜不幸被坠落的陨石砸中，逸散的脑电波阴差阳错绑定了万人迷系统，获得了能够重塑肉身的机会，在系统的帮助下，她穿梭到综英美的各个世界中获取主角体内的能量，咦，你问要怎么获取？嘿嘿......当然是和主角成为朋友啦！
